INCLUDE PERFETTO MODULE android.frames.timeline;
INCLUDE PERFETTO MODULE android.binder;
WITH
-- 获取 VSync 周期（从 VSYNC-sf 信号计算，限定在分析区间内）
vsync_intervals AS (
  SELECT
    c.ts - LAG(c.ts) OVER (ORDER BY c.ts) as interval_ns
  FROM counter c
  JOIN counter_track t ON c.track_id = t.id
  WHERE t.name = 'VSYNC-sf'
    AND (NULL IS NULL OR c.ts >= NULL)
    AND (NULL IS NULL OR c.ts < NULL)
),
vsync_config AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT CAST(PERCENTILE(interval_ns, 0.5) AS INTEGER)
       FROM vsync_intervals
       WHERE interval_ns > 5000000 AND interval_ns < 15000000),
      8333333  -- 默认 120Hz
    ) as raw_vsync_period_ns
),
snapped_refresh AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN raw_vsync_period_ns < 4880000 THEN 240
      WHEN raw_vsync_period_ns < 6300000 THEN 175
      WHEN raw_vsync_period_ns < 7610000 THEN 144
      WHEN raw_vsync_period_ns < 9620000 THEN 120
      WHEN raw_vsync_period_ns < 13610000 THEN 90
      WHEN raw_vsync_period_ns < 23570000 THEN 60
      WHEN raw_vsync_period_ns < 37270000 THEN 30
      WHEN raw_vsync_period_ns < 52700000 THEN 24
      ELSE 15
    END as refresh_rate_hz
  FROM vsync_config
),
timing_config AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(ROUND(1e9 / refresh_rate_hz, 0) AS INTEGER) as vsync_period_ns,
    refresh_rate_hz
  FROM snapped_refresh
),
time_range AS (
  SELECT
    MIN(a.ts) as start_ts,
    MAX(a.ts + a.dur) as end_ts,
    MAX(a.ts + a.dur) - MIN(a.ts) as duration_ns
  FROM actual_frame_timeline_slice a
  LEFT JOIN process p ON a.upid = p.upid
  WHERE (p.name GLOB '*' OR '' = '')
    AND p.name NOT LIKE '/system/%'
    AND (NULL IS NULL OR a.ts >= NULL)
    AND (NULL IS NULL OR a.ts < NULL)
    AND COALESCE(a.display_frame_token, a.surface_frame_token) IS NOT NULL
),
-- VSYNC-sf 事件
vsync_events AS (
  SELECT
    c.ts as vsync_ts,
    c.ts - LAG(c.ts) OVER (ORDER BY c.ts) as interval_ns
  FROM counter c
  JOIN counter_track t ON c.track_id = t.id
  WHERE t.name = 'VSYNC-sf'
    AND (NULL IS NULL OR c.ts >= NULL)
    AND (NULL IS NULL OR c.ts < NULL)
),
-- BufferTX 事件
buffer_events AS (
  SELECT c.ts, c.value as buffer_count
  FROM counter c
  JOIN counter_track t ON c.track_id = t.id
  WHERE t.name LIKE '%BufferTX%'
    AND (t.name LIKE '%%' OR '' = '')
    AND (NULL IS NULL OR c.ts < NULL)
),
-- 在每个 VSync 时刻查找 BufferTX 状态 + 最近帧的 jank_type
vsync_with_buffer AS (
  SELECT
    v.vsync_ts,
    v.interval_ns,
    (SELECT b.buffer_count
     FROM buffer_events b
     WHERE b.ts <= v.vsync_ts
     ORDER BY b.ts DESC
     LIMIT 1
    ) as buffer_at_vsync,
    -- 查找覆盖此 VSYNC 时刻的帧的 jank_type（±20ms 容差）
    (SELECT a.jank_type
     FROM actual_frame_timeline_slice a
     LEFT JOIN process p ON a.upid = p.upid
     WHERE (p.name GLOB '*' OR '' = '')
       AND p.name NOT LIKE '/system/%'
       AND COALESCE(a.display_frame_token, a.surface_frame_token) IS NOT NULL
       AND a.ts <= v.vsync_ts AND a.ts + a.dur >= v.vsync_ts - 20000000
     ORDER BY ABS(a.ts + a.dur / 2 - v.vsync_ts)
     LIMIT 1
    ) as frame_jank_type
  FROM vsync_events v
  WHERE v.interval_ns IS NOT NULL
),
-- 计算掉帧（VSYNC-sf 间隔大 = 用户可见掉帧，jank_type 优先 + BufferTX 补充）
jank_analysis AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) as total_vsync,
    -- 总用户可见掉帧: VSYNC-sf 间隔 > 1.5x 正常周期
    SUM(CASE WHEN interval_ns > (SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) * 1.5
              AND interval_ns <= (SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) * 6
              THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as total_jank_count,
    -- App 侧掉帧: jank_type 优先，BufferTX 补充
    SUM(CASE WHEN interval_ns > (SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) * 1.5
              AND interval_ns <= (SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) * 6
              AND (
                frame_jank_type IN ('Self Jank', 'App Deadline Missed')
                OR (frame_jank_type IS NULL AND buffer_at_vsync = 0)
                OR (buffer_at_vsync = 0 AND frame_jank_type NOT GLOB '*SurfaceFlinger*')
              ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as app_jank_count,
    -- SF 侧掉帧: 仅当 jank_type 明确标记 SF
    SUM(CASE WHEN interval_ns > (SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) * 1.5
              AND interval_ns <= (SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) * 6
              AND frame_jank_type GLOB '*SurfaceFlinger*'
              THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sf_jank_count,
    -- 计算最大跳过的 VSync 数（任意掉帧事件）
    MAX(CASE WHEN interval_ns > (SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) * 1.5
              AND interval_ns <= (SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) * 6
        THEN CAST(ROUND(interval_ns * 1.0 / (SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) - 1) AS INTEGER)
        ELSE 0 END) as max_vsync_missed,
    -- 累计跳过的 VSync 数
    SUM(CASE WHEN interval_ns > (SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) * 1.5
              AND interval_ns <= (SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) * 6
        THEN CAST(ROUND(interval_ns * 1.0 / (SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) - 1) AS INTEGER)
        ELSE 0 END) as total_vsync_missed
  FROM vsync_with_buffer
  WHERE buffer_at_vsync IS NOT NULL
),
app_frame_intervals AS (
  SELECT
    a.ts + CASE WHEN a.dur > 0 THEN a.dur ELSE 0 END as present_ts,
    LAG(a.ts + CASE WHEN a.dur > 0 THEN a.dur ELSE 0 END)
      OVER (PARTITION BY a.layer_name ORDER BY a.ts, COALESCE(a.display_frame_token, a.surface_frame_token)) as prev_present_ts
  FROM actual_frame_timeline_slice a
  LEFT JOIN process p ON a.upid = p.upid
  WHERE (p.name GLOB '*' OR '' = '')
    AND p.name NOT LIKE '/system/%'
    AND (NULL IS NULL OR a.ts >= NULL)
    AND (NULL IS NULL OR a.ts < NULL)
    AND COALESCE(a.display_frame_token, a.surface_frame_token) IS NOT NULL
),
valid_frame_intervals AS (
  SELECT
    present_ts - prev_present_ts as frame_interval_ns
  FROM app_frame_intervals
  WHERE prev_present_ts IS NOT NULL
    AND present_ts > prev_present_ts
    AND present_ts - prev_present_ts >= (SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) * 0.5
    AND present_ts - prev_present_ts <= (SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) * 6
),
-- App 报告的掉帧（旧逻辑，仅供参考）
app_stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) as total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN jank_type != 'None' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as app_janky_frames,
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT CAST(ROUND(AVG(frame_interval_ns)) AS INTEGER) FROM valid_frame_intervals),
      CAST(ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN dur > 0 THEN dur ELSE NULL END)) AS INTEGER),
      0
    ) as avg_present_interval,
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT CAST(MAX(frame_interval_ns) AS INTEGER) FROM valid_frame_intervals),
      MAX(CASE WHEN dur > 0 THEN dur ELSE NULL END),
      0
    ) as max_present_interval,
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT CAST(ROUND(PERCENTILE(frame_interval_ns, 0.5)) AS INTEGER) FROM valid_frame_intervals),
      CAST(ROUND(PERCENTILE(CASE WHEN dur > 0 THEN dur ELSE NULL END, 0.5)) AS INTEGER),
      0
    ) as median_present_interval,
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT CAST(ROUND(PERCENTILE(frame_interval_ns, 0.95)) AS INTEGER) FROM valid_frame_intervals),
      CAST(ROUND(PERCENTILE(CASE WHEN dur > 0 THEN dur ELSE NULL END, 0.95)) AS INTEGER),
      0
    ) as p95_present_interval,
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT CAST(ROUND(PERCENTILE(frame_interval_ns, 0.99)) AS INTEGER) FROM valid_frame_intervals),
      CAST(ROUND(PERCENTILE(CASE WHEN dur > 0 THEN dur ELSE NULL END, 0.99)) AS INTEGER),
      0
    ) as p99_present_interval
  FROM actual_frame_timeline_slice a
  LEFT JOIN process p ON a.upid = p.upid
  WHERE (p.name GLOB '*' OR '' = '')
    AND p.name NOT LIKE '/system/%'
    AND (NULL IS NULL OR a.ts >= NULL)
    AND (NULL IS NULL OR a.ts < NULL)
    AND COALESCE(a.display_frame_token, a.surface_frame_token) IS NOT NULL
),
consumer_gap_stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) as total_frames,
    SUM(CASE WHEN display_frame_token - prev_display_token > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as consumer_jank_frames,
    SUM(CASE WHEN display_frame_token - prev_display_token > 1 THEN (display_frame_token - prev_display_token - 1) ELSE 0 END) as total_vsync_missed,
    MAX(display_frame_token - prev_display_token) as max_token_gap
  FROM (
    SELECT
      COALESCE(a.display_frame_token, a.surface_frame_token) as display_frame_token,
      LAG(COALESCE(a.display_frame_token, a.surface_frame_token)) OVER (PARTITION BY a.layer_name ORDER BY a.ts) as prev_display_token
    FROM actual_frame_timeline_slice a
    LEFT JOIN process p ON a.upid = p.upid
    WHERE (p.name GLOB '*' OR '' = '')
      AND p.name NOT LIKE '/system/%'
      AND (NULL IS NULL OR a.ts >= NULL)
      AND (NULL IS NULL OR a.ts < NULL)
      AND COALESCE(a.display_frame_token, a.surface_frame_token) IS NOT NULL
  )
  WHERE prev_display_token IS NOT NULL
),
resolved_jank AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT total_jank_count FROM jank_analysis),
      (SELECT consumer_jank_frames FROM consumer_gap_stats),
      (SELECT app_janky_frames FROM app_stats),
      0
    ) as janky_frames,
    CASE
      WHEN (SELECT total_jank_count FROM jank_analysis) IS NOT NULL
        THEN COALESCE((SELECT app_jank_count FROM jank_analysis), 0)
      ELSE COALESCE((SELECT app_janky_frames FROM app_stats), 0)
    END as app_jank_raw,
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT max_vsync_missed FROM jank_analysis),
      (SELECT max_token_gap FROM consumer_gap_stats) - 1,
      0
    ) as max_vsync_missed,
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT total_vsync_missed FROM jank_analysis),
      (SELECT total_vsync_missed FROM consumer_gap_stats),
      0
    ) as total_vsync_missed,
    CASE
      WHEN (SELECT total_jank_count FROM jank_analysis) IS NULL THEN 'frame_token_gap'
      ELSE 'vsync_sf_interval'
    END as fps_source
),
resolved_jank_clamped AS (
  SELECT
    janky_frames,
    CASE
      WHEN app_jank_raw < 0 THEN 0
      WHEN app_jank_raw > janky_frames THEN janky_frames
      ELSE app_jank_raw
    END as app_janky_frames,
    max_vsync_missed,
    total_vsync_missed,
    fps_source
  FROM resolved_jank
)
SELECT
  (SELECT total FROM app_stats) as total_frames,
  (SELECT janky_frames FROM resolved_jank_clamped) as janky_frames,
  (SELECT app_janky_frames FROM resolved_jank_clamped) as app_janky_frames,
  MAX(
    (SELECT janky_frames FROM resolved_jank_clamped) -
    (SELECT app_janky_frames FROM resolved_jank_clamped),
    0
  ) as sf_jank_count,
  -- 总掉帧率
  ROUND(
    100.0 * (SELECT janky_frames FROM resolved_jank_clamped) / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM app_stats), 0),
    2
  ) as jank_rate,
  -- App 侧掉帧率
  ROUND(
    100.0 * (SELECT app_janky_frames FROM resolved_jank_clamped) / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM app_stats), 0),
    2
  ) as app_jank_rate,
  -- SF 侧掉帧率
  ROUND(
    100.0 * MAX(
      (SELECT janky_frames FROM resolved_jank_clamped) -
      (SELECT app_janky_frames FROM resolved_jank_clamped),
      0
    ) / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM app_stats), 0),
    2
  ) as sf_jank_rate,
  (SELECT avg_present_interval FROM app_stats) as avg_frame_dur,
  (SELECT max_present_interval FROM app_stats) as max_frame_dur,
  (SELECT median_present_interval FROM app_stats) as median_frame_dur,
  (SELECT p95_present_interval FROM app_stats) as p95_frame_dur,
  (SELECT p99_present_interval FROM app_stats) as p99_frame_dur,
  ROUND((SELECT duration_ns FROM time_range) / 1e9, 2) as duration_sec,
  MIN(
    ROUND(1e9 * (SELECT total FROM app_stats) / NULLIF((SELECT duration_ns FROM time_range), 0), 1),
    (SELECT refresh_rate_hz FROM timing_config)
  ) as actual_fps,
  (SELECT refresh_rate_hz FROM timing_config) as refresh_rate,
  CASE
    WHEN (SELECT janky_frames FROM resolved_jank_clamped) = 0 THEN '优秀'
    WHEN 100.0 * (SELECT janky_frames FROM resolved_jank_clamped) / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM app_stats), 0) < 1 THEN '优秀'
    WHEN 100.0 * (SELECT janky_frames FROM resolved_jank_clamped) / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM app_stats), 0) < 5 THEN '良好'
    WHEN 100.0 * (SELECT janky_frames FROM resolved_jank_clamped) / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM app_stats), 0) < 15 THEN '一般'
    ELSE '较差'
  END as rating,
  (SELECT fps_source FROM resolved_jank_clamped) as fps_source,
  (SELECT max_vsync_missed FROM resolved_jank_clamped) as max_vsync_missed,
  (SELECT total_vsync_missed FROM resolved_jank_clamped) as total_vsync_missed,
  ROUND((SELECT vsync_period_ns FROM timing_config) / 1e6, 2) as vsync_period_ms
LIMIT 1
